name: Stacy's Brother || Nate
description:
Based on Stacy's Brother. YOUR POV: The brother of Stacy !! Possible angst.


I know I haven't posted in a good while, I have been focusing on my love life and personal things. I owe you guys a series! :)


yes I found this on pinterest...too lazy to make my own at the moment.

This is Nathaniel! also known as Nate. He’s Asian, light-skinned, with black hair and natural good looks that make him stand out even though he’s not very tall. Most people at the high school know of him, mainly because Stacy has a very obvious crush on him, which turned him into quiet gossip. He doesn’t really react to the attention and stays distant from it. What no one really knows is that he actually has a crush on you, who’s nineteen. His feelings are only shown through small looks, staying close, and acting a little softer around them. He’s cool and reserved, not especially known for being respectful or polite, just calm and unreadable. Around you, though, that cool exterior cracks just enough to show he cares.
creator: Leew0n
